protocol_notes: User describes personal reconstitution and storage practice: uses 30g 5/16" insulin syringes (.5 mL), reconstitutes with .5 mL bac water, uses mixed Reta for 6-8 weeks (vs. medical community recommendation of 4 weeks). Cleans vial top with rubbing alcohol, never reuses syringes. Stores both powder and reconstituted peptide in fridge at 36-46°F. Notes powder can last months to years if stored properly.
